title: Vernonanthura hieracioides
taxonomy: Vernonanthura hieracioides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to South America. It belongs to the genus Vernonanthura, which is a group of flowering plants that are often found in open, sunny areas. Vernonanthura hieracioides is also known as the yellow buttons or the Brazil button, and is often used as a decorative plant. The plant's classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Asterales.
